title: Chore-Time breaks ground on manufacturing expansion in Milford
description:

title: 12 dead in crash of plane on skydiving outing
description:
A plane carrying a pilot and 11 passengers on a skydiving outing in Missouri crashed in a field and was engulfed in flames Sunday, killing all aboard, authorities said.

description:

title: Dennis Reinbold, Indy auto dealer and racing team owner, dies at 65
description:
Dennis J. Reinbold, an Indianapolis-area car dealer and owner of IndyCar team Dreyer & Reinbold Racing, died on Saturday, reportedly after a prolonged battle with cancer. He was 65.

title: Purdue Cancer Institute secures $9.4M federal grant renewal
description:
The Purdue Institute for Cancer Research will receive $9.4 million in federal funding to continue its cancer research programs for the next five years.

title: Orr Fellowship sees success in Evansville expansion
description:
